# Gadget Pattern

A design pattern derived from [Widget Theory](./Widget Theory.md) for building resilient components.

## Usage
Applied in [Acme Project](../Ideas/Acme Project.md) to handle failure scenarios.
The pattern was validated by [Alice Smith](../People/Alice Smith.md)'s team.
